description:
Pocket Sync


What's Changed
- Shows more updates in the UI while downloads are happening by @neil-morrison44 in #465
- Updates platform limit calculation by @neil-morrison44 in #467
- Bump actions/download-artifact from 6 to 8 by @dependabot[bot] in #449
- Bump actions/configure-pages from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in #448
- Bump actions/upload-pages-artifact from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in #446
- Allows for cancelling a download without waiting for a whole file to download by @neil-morrison44 in #468
Full Changelog: v6.2.4...v6.3.0
